specification: forall code_findings, gate_failures: Report::reject(code, gate, _).is_ok() implies !code.is_empty() or !gate.is_empty()
forall l: Lane: Lane::from_str(format!('{}', l)).unwrap() == l
notes: Test all 10 variants. Also test: from_str(fmt) == Err, from_str(fmt_lane) == Err

description: reject_kind depends only on collection emptiness, not FindingEffect
specification: forall r: Report::Reject: r.reject_kind().is_some() iff !r.code_findings.is_empty() or !r.gate_failures.is_empty()
notes: Prove that iterate over code_findings does not depend on FindingEffect values. Only count emptiness.

specification: forall evidence: LaneEvidence: LaneOutcome::clean(evidence).is_ok() iff evidence.exit_status == ProcessTermination::Exited(code = 0)
notes: Test with Exited{0}, Exited{1}, Signaled{9}, TimedOut, SpawnFailed. Only Exited{0} succeeds.

description: QualityReceipt lanes are subset of GateScope lanes
specification: forall qr: QualityReceipt: forall lr in qr.lanes: LaneReceipt::lane(lr) in GateScope::lanes(qr.scope)
notes: Prove LaneReceipt lane membership is subset of scope lane set. GateScope::Edit has 7 lanes, Prepush 10, Release 10.

description: WorkspacePath rejects absolute paths and .. components
specification: forall s: str: WorkspacePath::new(s).is_ok() iff !s.starts_with('/') and !s.contains(..) and !s.is_empty()
notes: Prove constructor rejects absolute paths, parent references, empty strings. Existing type has invariant for this.

specification: forall file: str, range: TextRange, replacement: str: RepairHint::patch(file, range, replacement).is_ok() iff range.end() > range.start()
notes: Test with zero-width range and non-zero-width range.

specification: forall executable: str, argv: Box<[str]>: CommandEvidence::new(executable, argv).is_ok() iff !argv.is_empty() and argv[0] == executable
notes: Test with empty argv, argv[0] != executable, and matching argv.
Windows has no signal concept. TerminateProcess appears as Exited{1}. Test with signal values 1-31.

specification: forall sv: u16: sv != RECEIPT_SCHEMA_VERSION implies QualityReceipt::new(..., sv, ...).is_err()

description: Location::Span uses 1-based lines and non-negative columns
specification: forall file: WorkspacePath, ls: u32, cs: u32, le: u32, ce: u32: Location::span(file, ls, cs, le, ce).is_ok() implies ls >= 1 and cs >= 0 and le >= 0 and ce >= 0
notes: Line numbers are 1-based per spec; columns are 0-based Unicode scalar values. Test ls=0 is rejected.

description: GateScope is non_exhaustive so external code cannot exhaustively match
specification: forall external code: match scope on GateScope requires default arm due to non_exhaustive attribute
notes: This is an API contract enforced at compile time by the non_exhaustive attribute. Add a compile-fail test.
